input: To Whom It May Concern: Our organization subscribed to your enterprise tier on January 3rd. The API access promised in the contract has not been provisioned as of February 22nd — seven weeks overdue. We require a formal written explanation and a binding remediation timeline by end of week.
response: Dear Sir or Madam, we acknowledge your complaint regarding the seven-week delay in API provisioning. This falls below our service standards and we apologize unreservedly. API access will be provisioned by February 26th. A written explanation and remediation report will be delivered by February 24th. Enterprise Support Division.
